name: Lamb Stew with Vegetables
recipeIngredient: 3 pounds boneless lamb stewing meat, well trimmed
3 large carrots, peeled and sliced thin
recipeInstructions:
1. Wipe off any collected juices from the lamb.
2. Combine flour with salt, sugar, dried thyme leaves, black pepper, and garlic powder; toss with lamb to coat thoroughly.
3. Place all ingredients except peas in a Crock-Pot.
4. Stir well. Cover and cook on Low for 10 to 12 hours.
5. One hour before serving, turn the Crock-Pot to High and stir in frozen peas.
6. Cover and cook until done.
Serves 6 to 8
Note: Peas may be added at the beginning of cooking, but will darken slightly.
